# Spec interview practice pointer

| Resource | Role |
|----------|------|
| [tig/xuss-lame](https://github.com/tig/xuss-lame) (private) | Rough first-draft product tree (thin/messy `spec.md`) for interview dry-runs |
| [silico/knowledge/spec-interview.md](../../../silico/knowledge/spec-interview.md) | Agent guidance + **anti-cheat** |
| [tig/silico#68](https://github.com/tig/silico/issues/68) | Issue |

The practice GCU does not label itself as a test. Anti-cheat lives in **silico** knowledge: when working in `xuss-lame`, do not open `tig/xuss` or `tig/xuss-c` for product truth.
